title: Technology in the world
description: A small modpack with Create, ComputerCraft and AppliedEnergistics.
body:
A small modpack with Create, ComputerCraft and AppliedEnergistics. Quests will show you how to use these mods. Runs on weak computers because of many performance mods. Look at the gallery if you want to know more about the modpack.

**Credits:**\
-[Create Immersive Aircrafts (Resource Pack)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-resource-pack)\
-[Create Immersive Aircrafts (Data Pack)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-data-pack)
